inbospatial: A Collection of Useful R Functions for Spatial Data

Source: R/inbospatial-package.R
inbospatial-package.Rd

Useful R functions developed at the Research Institute for Nature and Forest (INBO) for dealing with spatial raster or vector data.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/inbo/inbospatial

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/inbo/inbospatial/issues

Author

Maintainer: Hans Van Calster hans.vancalster@inbo.be (ORCID) (Research Institute for Nature and Forest (INBO))

Other contributors:

  • Research Institute for Nature and Forest (INBO) info@inbo.be [copyright holder, funder]
